next_steps: Secure airway given the history of recurrent bleeding and local mass effect
Perform diagnostic excisional biopsy or deep tissue biopsy under controlled conditions
Submit tissue for histopathological evaluation with immunohistochemistry (MyoD1, myogenin, desmin, pan-cytokeratin, CD20, CD3, S100)
Perform molecular testing including FISH for FOXO1 translocation and NGS for rhabdomyosarcoma-associated mutations
Obtain MRI of the neck with and without contrast for better tissue characterization
Consult pediatric/head and neck oncology multidisciplinary team
